Voucher Cards & Passes · 2026
Golf Pass Mallorca
€89 · 30 uses · 365 days
High season (Mar, Apr, May, Sep, Oct, 1–20 Nov)
30% off rack rate · before 09:00 or after 13:00 only. Max once per course.

Low season (Jan, Feb, Jun–Aug, 21 Nov–31 Dec)
2×1 · pay for 1 player, 2 play. Any time. Max twice per course.

Buy Golf Pass →
Mallorca Golfcard 2026
€164 · 31 vouchers · 19 courses
Physical voucher book + credit-card ID. Two mechanics: 2FOR1 (two play, one pays) or special price for two. Plus 10% off always at 15 partner courses · even without a voucher. Valid 1 Jan–31 Dec 2026. Phone booking required.
Includes premium courses: Alcanada · Son Gual · T Golf Calvià · Son Muntaner and 15 more. 2FOR1 can save up to €200 at Alcanada on one round.
Buy Mallorca Golfcard →
Mallorca Golf à la Card
€109 · choose 6 vouchers · each usable twice
Online only. Pick any 6 from 23 available vouchers · each can be used twice (12 rounds max). Same 2FOR1 / special-price terms as the full Golfcard, but no 10% always benefit. Ideal if you only play a handful of courses.
Not available: Alcanada · Son Gual · Son Muntaner · T Golf Calvià
Available: Capdepera · Pula · Son Servera · Bendinat · Maioris · Pollença · Santa Ponsa · Son Antem E&W · Son Quint · Son Vida · Son Termes · T Golf Palma · Vall d'Or + more
Buy à la Card →

Before you book

Which card is worth buying→

Three products give you discounted golf across Mallorca. Each works differently. Here is exactly what you get with each one, so you can decide before buying.

Digital pass · 365 days from purchase

Golf Pass Mallorca

€89
one-off purchase

What you get

  • 30 green fee uses
  • 10 courses covered
  • 365 days validity
  • Digital · works by phone / email to course

The discounts

High season (Mar, Apr, May, Sep, Oct, 1–20 Nov)

30% off the published rack rate. Time restriction: before 09:00 or after 13:00 only. Max 1 use per course.

Low season (Jan, Feb, Jun–Aug, 21 Nov–31 Dec)

2×1 · pay for 1 green fee, 2 players play. Any time of day. Max 2 uses per course.

10 courses included · official green fees

Course Low season High season 30% save (high)
Alcanada €115–170 €170–200 save €51–60
Golf Andratx €96–105 €140 save €42
Son Termes €80 €100 save €30
Pula €78–104 €104–136 save €31–41
Son Antem East €98 €130 save €39
Son Antem West €101 €135 save €40
Son Muntaner Dynamic (check arabellagolfmallorca.com) 30% off
Son Quint Dynamic (check arabellagolfmallorca.com) 30% off
Son Vida Dynamic (check arabellagolfmallorca.com) 30% off
Golf Pollença €55 (18h) €65 (18h) save €19

30% discount applies to the rack rate. Low season = 2×1 offer (any time, max twice per course).

Is it worth it→ If you play Alcanada once in high season (before 09:00 or after 13:00), you save 30% on say €220 = €66 saved. That more than covers the €89 pass on a single round. Anyone playing 3+ rounds across the 10 courses in a trip will almost certainly save money.

Buy Golf Pass Mallorca →

Physical booklet · valid 1 Jan · 31 Dec 2026

Mallorca Golfcard 2026

€164
+ shipping · limited print run

31 vouchers · 19+ courses

Physical booklet posted to you. Must present card + voucher at check-in. Advance phone booking required · without confirmed booking, the course has no obligation to honour it.

10% off always · 15 courses

No voucher needed · just show your card. Applies to the rack rate, not promotional prices. Valid for you + 1 companion.

Santa Ponsa 1 V1: 2FOR1 · V2: 2 GF €96 or 2 GF+buggy €126 V1: Jan 1–5, 15 May–22 Jun, 1–16 Nov, 22–31 Dec · V2: 6 Jan–28 Feb, 23 Jun–6 Sep, 17 Nov–21 Dec From 12:00 €115

Son Gual ⚑ V1: 2FOR1 Wednesdays only · V2: 2 GF+buggy+2 token (seasonal price, save €51) V1: 26 Feb, 12 Mar, 25 Jun, 23 Jul, 27 Aug, 19 Nov, 17 Dec · V2: Tue–Thu all year Any €51
Son Muntaner ⚑ 2 GF + buggy €235 (buggy incl. 1 Mar–24 Nov) Jan–15 Mar, 1 Jun–6 Sep, 9 Nov–31 Dec From 12:00 €65+

Son Servera V1: 2FOR1 · V2: 2 GF+buggy €175–215 V1: Jan, Feb, Jun–Sep, Nov, Dec · V2: specific date windows (save €33–43) Varies €140
Son Termes V1: 2FOR1 all year · V2: 2 GF+buggy €125–170 V1: all year · V2: high season €170 / low season €125 Any €80
Son Vida 2 GF + buggy €190 Jan–15 Mar, 1 Jun–6 Sep, 9 Nov–31 Dec From 12:00 €100+
T Golf Calvià ⚑ 2 GF €200 (special price) 7 Jan–28 Feb, 5 Jul–4 Sep, 10 Nov–23 Dec Any €100+
T Golf Palma Puntiro 2 GF €150 7 Jan–28 Feb, 5 Jul–10 Sep, 10 Nov–23 Dec Any €50+
Vall d'Or 2 GF + buggy: €257.50 (high) / €211.60 (low) All year · High: 15 Mar–14 Jun, 15 Sep–14 Nov Any €45+

⚑ = Full Golfcard only, not available with à la Card. All vouchers require advance phone booking and course confirmation. Always present both your card AND voucher at check-in.

Is it worth it→ One 2FOR1 round at Alcanada in peak season saves up to €200 · more than the card price alone. The 10% always benefit means you keep saving even after your vouchers are used. Best value for pairs who play multiple courses.

Important: all vouchers require advance phone booking with the course. Without confirmed booking, the course is not obliged to honour the voucher.

Buy Mallorca Golfcard 2026 →

Online only · choose your 6 courses

Mallorca Golf à la Card

€109
online only · choose 6 vouchers

What you get

  • Choose 6 vouchers from 23 available courses
  • Each voucher can be used twice = up to 12 rounds
  • Same deal terms as the full Golfcard for each course
  • No 10% always benefit (that only comes with the full Golfcard)

Not available here

These 4 courses are excluded:

Alcanada · Son Gual · Son Muntaner · T Golf Calvià

If you want to play any of these, you need the full Golfcard (€164).

Is it worth it→ Good value if you are planning 4–6 rounds at mid-tier courses and do not need the top four. Cheaper than the full Golfcard. Ideal for shorter trips focused around one area of the island.

Buy à la Card 2026 →

Mr Mallorca Golf

Play the Course.
With the Pro.

Andy Griffiths is a UK PGA Advanced Professional based in Mallorca. He plays, reviews, and knows every course on this island · and he can arrange the whole day for you. Not just the tee time.

I

Solo

€495 · Andy's day rate. Play 18 holes alongside him, with a pre-round briefing, warm-up, on-course guidance, and a debrief after. Green fees are separate.

II

Group

€950 · Andy's fixed day rate for groups of 2 or 3. Green fees and food are separate.

III

The Signature Experience

From €3,000 · Fully arranged. Video, Michelin lunch, transfers, spa, premium club hire. Everything confirmed in advance.

Green fees, buggy, and food are separate. Confirmed when we speak.

WhatsApp Andy View packages →

"The greens at Son Gual are fast and raised. Where you miss matters more than how you swing. I can tell you exactly where to miss on each one."

· Andy Griffiths, UK PGA Advanced Professional
